product_overview: Supervisor-IA 4.0 is a next-generation SaaS ecosystem designed for civil infrastructure supervision. It functions as a Dynamic Digital Twin that integrates computer vision and generative AI to synchronize the design models with actual construction progress, enabling real-time automated auditing, safety supervision, and deep analytics.
core_goals: Enable precise geometric auditing by comparing planned (as-designed) and actual (as-built) models to detect deviations and identify structural risks.
Provide automated safety and health supervision on construction sites using computer vision to monitor worker safety and materials management.
Offer comprehensive, high-quality, and visually rich report generation including 3D visualizations, progress analytics, and digital signatures for stakeholders.
Support augmented reality visualization to overlay planned structures on-site for proactive interference detection and project validation.
Deliver a robust SaaS platform scalable for single projects or corporate-wide deployment with multi-tenancy, security, and compliance.
Leverage advanced orchestration and knowledge-based systems to automate workflows, integrate real-time data, and enforce regulatory knowledge in construction supervision.
key_features: Dynamic Digital Twin powered by 3D reconstruction from drone and mobile photos, producing lightweight .obj meshes.
Operation Orchestrator with n8n automating workflows from drone photo uploads through 3D model processing to alert notifications.
Knowledge Vector Database using Supabase with pgvector to embed technical and legal construction standards for evidence-based diagnostics.
Model Context Protocol interface allowing natural language interaction with infrastructure data, enabling read/write commands to both database and workflows.
Automated geometric discrepancy detection comparing Revit theoretical models and Tencent-generated real site models with risk visualizations.
Computer vision safety compliance checks identifying worker harness usage and safe material stacking, triggering real-time alerts via WhatsApp.
Deep analytics report generation producing detailed colored PDFs with 3D figures, performance graphs, and electronic signatures ready for management dissemination.
Augmented reality interface projecting planned structures onto physical sites using device cameras to identify construction interferences early.
SaaS monetization model supporting monthly subscriptions per project or corporate dashboards for multi-project governance.
Proven technology readiness level 5 validated in a relevant construction environment with plans toward higher TRL stages.
user_flow_summary: User logs into the platform using secure Supabase email/password authentication with session persistence and error handling.
Upon login, the dashboard displays key performance indicators including counts of organizations, projects, and WBS nodes relevant to the user.
User accesses the construction data including organizations, projects, and detailed WBS tree structures managed by secure, row-level data policies.
Drone or mobile photos captured from the construction site are uploaded and automatically received by orchestrator workflows (n8n).
The photo data triggers asynchronous 3D reconstruction into optimized OBJ files leveraging Tencent Hunyuan 3D engine.
Reconstructed 3D models (real as-built) are automatically compared with the planned Revit OBJ model to detect geometric deviations and structural risks.
Safety monitoring executes computer vision on photos to verify compliance (like harness use), sending immediate alerts via WhatsApp if issues arise.
End-of-day, the system compiles progress data to generate comprehensive PDF reports with 3D visuals, performance analytics, and ready-to-send digital signatures.
Users employ the augmented reality feature via device cameras to visualize the planned infrastructure overlaid on the real-world construction site, preemptively spotting conflicts.
Admin or corporate users can monitor multiple projects via consolidated SaaS dashboards with data access fully secured by multi-tenant RLS policies.
validation_criteria: Successful integration and operation of the four core engines: 3D reconstruction, orchestrator workflows, vector knowledge database, and MCP interface.
System correctly detects and visualizes geometric deviations between planned and actual construction models within target accuracy thresholds.
Real-time safety compliance monitoring identifies hazards with >95% accuracy and timely alert distribution.
Automated PDF report generation produces detailed, visually rich documents with 3D elements and digital signatures matching quality standards.
Augmented reality visualization overlays precisely registered 3D models at construction sites enabling effective detection of interference issues.
User authentication and data access enforce strict row-level security, preventing unauthorized cross-organization data exposure.
System achieves stable performance under realistic multi-project load scenarios with session persistence and error recovery.
Positive user feedback on usability, error messaging, and overall operational readiness consistent with TRL 5 validation milestones.

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Complete login flow with Supabase Auth. Includes email/password authentication, session persistence, and protected routes. Displays login form with validation and error handling.

features.name: Supabase Client
features.description: Singleton Supabase client with Database typing, authentication support, session management, and connection testing. Exports getCurrentUser, isAuthenticated, signOut, and testConnection functions.

features.name: Construction Data Hook
features.description: React hook (useConstructionData) for managing construction project data. Handles loading organizations, projects, and WBS nodes from Supabase with full RLS enforcement. Includes idempotent seeding functionality with existence guards.

features.name: Dashboard View
features.description: Main dashboard component displaying KPIs (organizations count, projects count, WBS nodes count), project list with status badges, and WBS tree structure. Handles authentication states, loading states, seeding states, and error displays with friendly messages.

features.name: Idempotent Seed System
features.description: Database seeding functionality that creates Demo GARES organization, Altos de Trujillo project, and WBS node structure. Uses existence guards (SELECT before INSERT) to prevent duplicate entries. Emits multiple signals: TESTSPRITE_SIGNAL, TEST_STATUS, TESTSPRITE_CONTROL, STATUS_SIGNAL.

features.name: Row Level Security (RLS)
features.description: TRL 7 multi-tenancy enforcement. Users can only access data from their assigned organization via get_user_org() PostgreSQL function. Blocks unauthenticated access completely.

features.name: Type Definitions
features.description: TypeScript types for Supabase database schema including Organization, Project, WBSNode, and complete Database interface with Row, Insert, Update types.

features.name: KPI Cards Component
features.description: Reusable KPI display component showing count metrics with icons and color themes (cyan, orange, green) for organizations, projects, and WBS nodes.

features.name: WBS Tree Component
features.description: Recursive tree component for displaying Work Breakdown Structure hierarchy with indentation, code labels, and child counts.

features.name: Error Handling
features.description: Comprehensive error handling for connection failures, authentication errors, RLS policy violations, and infrastructure configuration issues. Shows friendly messages in Spanish.
